description: Attijariwafa Bank is a Moroccan multinational banking and financial services company established through the merger of Wafabank and Banque Commerciale du Maroc. It operates in 27 countries across Africa and Europe, offering banking, asset management, insurance, and wealth management services.

Itissalat Al-Maghrib (Maroc Telecom) is a leading telecommunications provider offering mobile, fixed-line, and internet services, including 4G+ mobile internet, optical fiber, cloud hosting, and digital solutions across Morocco and internationally.
Marsa Maroc operates port terminals and manages logistics services across multiple ports in Morocco, focusing on international quality standards and efficient maritime operations.

Banque Centrale Populaire (BCP) is a Morocco-based banking and financial services group established in 1961. It operates as a credit institution and provides banking, insurance, investment management services to individuals and businesses.

Bank of Africa is a Moroccan bank headquartered in Casablanca, providing financial services including banking, asset management, and insurance. It operates both domestically and internationally through subsidiaries.

TAQA Morocco is the first independent power producer in Morocco, operating the largest private coal‑fired thermal power plant in the MENA region located in Jorf Lasfar. It supplies a significant share of Morocco’s electricity demand and is a subsidiary of the Abu Dhabi‑based TAQA Group.

description: The Akdital Group is the leading private clinic group in Morocco and the MENA region, operating a network of multidisciplinary and specialized health establishments. Its main business activity is providing a wide range of healthcare services, including cardiology, cardiac surgery, neurosurgery, oncology, and radiotherapy, with a focus on making high-quality health services accessible to a larger portion of the Moroccan population.

description: Afriquia Gaz is a Moroccan company specializing in the import, refining, storage, carriage, and distribution of liquefied petroleum gas (LPG). Its main business activity is providing energy solutions for domestic and professional markets through an extensive distribution network.
